productDisplayName: Playboy Men Hollywood Perfume Buy 1 Get 1 free
description: Style Noteplayboy launches a new fragrance, named Hollywood, thus enlarging the collection of  fragrances which includes Ibiza, New york, Malibu, Miami and, Vegas edition. Hollywood is an oriental woody fragrance that perfectly captures the essence of a dazzling world of celebrity and glamour. It opens with the tantalising citrus head notes of mandarin, thyme, bergamot and elemi to deliver a vibrant freshness. At the heart, lavender, rosewood, and jasmine unite with cedar wood to give a subtly floral yet masculine elegance. The fragrance then settles on the warm base notes of vetiver, musk, warm amber, vanilla and sandalwood, creating a smooth, seductive experience that  makes this fragrance a must buy and what's more to double the joy, you buy one  perfume and get one absolutely free! Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
